channel.title: Prompt-Engineering on srvrlss.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Prompt-Engineering on srvrlss.dev

item.title: Token Exhaustion: What Three AI Coding Agents Taught Me in a Single Week
item.description:
I use GitHub Copilot. Curiosity pulled me toward Antigravity and Claude Code. I had a few experiments in mind. This was the perfect chance. My plan was simple: I would jump from one tool to the next and experience their workflows firsthand. The token wall blindsided me.

Token Wall: You run out of credits or have reached the productivity window usage limit.

The Token Wall: A Week of Surprises

First, GitHub Copilot. Next, Antigravity, with my Gemini Pro subscription. Finally, Claude Code on a brand new Pro account. Three AI coding agents. One week.
